+msgid ""
+msgstr ""
+"Project-Id-Version: vllm-ascend \n"
+"Report-Msgid-Bugs-To: \n"
+"POT-Creation-Date: 2026-06-07 05:04+0000\n"
+"PO-Revision-Date: YEAR-MO-DA HO:MI+ZONE\n"
+"Last-Translator: FULL NAME <EMAIL@ADDRESS>\n"
+"Language: zh_CN\n"
+"Language-Team: zh_CN <LL@li.org>\n"
+"Plural-Forms: nplurals=1; plural=0;\n"
+"MIME-Version: 1.0\n"
+"Content-Type: text/plain; charset=utf-8\n"
+"Content-Transfer-Encoding: 8bit\n"
+"Generated-By: Babel 2.18.0\n"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:1
+msgid "DeepSeek-V4-Flash"
+msgstr "DeepSeek-V4-Flash"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:3
+msgid "Introduction"
+msgstr "简介"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:5
+msgid "DeepSeek-V4 is introducing several key upgrades over DeepSeek-V3."
+msgstr "DeepSeek-V4在DeepSeek-V3基础上引入了多项关键升级。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:7
+msgid ""
+"The Manifold-Constrained Hyper-Connections (mHC) to strengthen "
+"conventional residual connections;"
+msgstr "流形约束超连接(mHC)增强传统残差连接；"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:8
+msgid ""
+"A hybrid attention architecture, which greatly improves long-context "
+"efficiency through Compress-4-Attention and Compress-128-Attention. For "
+"the Mixture-of Experts (MoE) components, it still adopt the DeepSeekMoE "
+"architecture, with only minor adjustments."
+msgstr "混合注意力架构，通过Compress-4-Attention和Compress-128-Attention大幅提升长上下文效率。对于混合专家(MoE)组件，仍采用DeepSeekMoE架构，仅做少量调整。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:10
+msgid ""
+"This document will show the main verification steps of the model, "
+"including supported features, feature configuration, environment "
+"preparation, single-node and multi-node deployment, accuracy and "
+"performance evaluation."
+msgstr "本文档将展示模型的主要验证步骤，包括支持特性、特性配置、环境准备、单节点和多节点部署、精度及性能评估。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:12
+msgid "Environment Preparation"
+msgstr "环境准备"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:14
+msgid "Model Weight"
+msgstr "模型权重"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:16
+msgid ""
+"`DeepSeek-V4-Flash-w8a8-mtp`(Quantized version): require 1 Atlas 800 A3 "
+"(128G × 8) node or 1 Atlas 800 A2 (64G × 8) node. [Download model "
+"weight](https://www.modelscope.cn/models/Eco-Tech/DeepSeek-V4-Flash-"
+"w8a8-mtp)"
+msgstr "`DeepSeek-V4-Flash-w8a8-mtp`(量化版本)：需要1个Atlas 800 A3 (128G × 8)节点或1个Atlas 800 A2 (64G × 8)节点。[下载模型权重](https://www.modelscope.cn/models/Eco-Tech/DeepSeek-V4-Flash-w8a8-mtp)"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:18
+msgid ""
+"It is recommended to download the model weight to the shared directory of"
+" multiple nodes, such as `/root/.cache/`"
+msgstr "建议将模型权重下载到多节点共享目录，例如`/root/.cache/`"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:20
+msgid "Verify Multi-node Communication(Optional)"
+msgstr "验证多节点通信(可选)"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:22
+msgid ""
+"If you want to deploy multi-node environment, you need to verify multi-"
+"node communication according to [verify multi-node communication "
+"environment](../../installation.md#verify-multi-node-communication)."
+msgstr "如需部署多节点环境，需按照[验证多节点通信环境](../../installation.md#verify-multi-node-communication)验证多节点通信。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:24
+msgid "Installation"
+msgstr "安装"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:26
+msgid "You can using our official docker image to run `DeepSeek-V4` directly."
+msgstr "您可以直接使用官方docker镜像运行`DeepSeek-V4`。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md
+msgid "A2 series"
+msgstr "A2系列"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:36
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:74
+msgid "Start the docker image on your each node."
+msgstr "在每个节点上启动docker镜像。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md
+msgid "A3 series"
+msgstr "A3系列"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:117
+msgid "Deployment"
+msgstr "部署"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:120
+msgid ""
+"In this tutorial, we suppose you downloaded the model weight to "
+"`/root/.cache/`. Feel free to change it to your own path."
+msgstr "在本教程中，我们假设您已将模型权重下载到`/root/.cache/`。您可以根据需要更改为自己的路径。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:123
+msgid "Single-node Deployment"
+msgstr "单节点部署"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:125
+msgid ""
+"`DeepSeek-V4-Flash-w8a8-mtp`: can be deployed on 1 Atlas 800 A3 (128G × "
+"8) or 1 Atlas 800 A2 (64G × 8)."
+msgstr "`DeepSeek-V4-Flash-w8a8-mtp`：可部署在1个Atlas 800 A3 (128G × 8)或1个Atlas 800 A2 (64G × 8)上。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:127
+msgid "Run the following scripts on each node respectively."
+msgstr "分别在每个节点上运行以下脚本。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:136
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:186
+msgid "Run the following script to execute online inference."
+msgstr "运行以下脚本执行在线推理。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:232
+msgid "Prefill-Decode Disaggregation"
+msgstr "Prefill-Decode分离式部署"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:234
+msgid ""
+"We'd like to show the deployment guide of DeepSeek-V4 on Atlas 800 A3 "
+"(128G × 8) multi-node environment with 1P1D for better performance."
+msgstr "我们将展示DeepSeek-V4在Atlas 800 A3 (128G × 8)多节点环境下的部署指南，采用1P1D配置以获得更优性能。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:236
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:515
+msgid "Before you start, please"
+msgstr "开始之前，请"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:238
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:517
+msgid "prepare the script `launch_online_dp.py` on each node."
+msgstr "在每个节点上准备脚本`launch_online_dp.py`。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:341
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:587
+msgid "prepare the script `run_dp_template.sh` on each node."
+msgstr "在每个节点上准备脚本`run_dp_template.sh`。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:343
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:497
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:589
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:762
+msgid "Prefill node"
+msgstr "Prefill节点"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:415
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:771
+msgid "Decode node"
+msgstr "Decode节点"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:495
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:760
+msgid ""
+"Once the preparation is done, you can start the server with the following"
+" command on each node:"
+msgstr "准备工作完成后，您可以在每个节点上使用以下命令启动服务器："
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:504
+msgid "Decode node 0"
+msgstr "Decode节点0"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:511
+msgid ""
+"Finally, Refer to [Prefill-Decode Disaggregation "
+"(Deepseek)](../features/pd_disaggregation_mooncake_multi_node.md) to "
+"deploy the P-D disaggregation proxy."
+msgstr "最后，参考[Prefill-Decode分离式部署(Deepseek)](../features/pd_disaggregation_mooncake_multi_node.md)部署P-D分离代理。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:513
+msgid ""
+"For Atlas 800 A2 series machines, we can configure the deployment(4\\*1P "
+"1\\*4D) as follows:."
+msgstr "对于Atlas 800 A2系列机器，可以按如下方式配置部署(4\\*1P 1\\*4D)："
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:670
+msgid ""
+"For each P instance, only these two configuration values need to be "
+"modified: “kv_port” and “engine_id”. The “engine_id” should start from 0 "
+"and increment sequentially, while the “kv_port” (e.g., “30100”) must be "
+"unique for each P instance, such as 30000, 30100, etc."
+msgstr "对于每个P实例，只需修改两个配置值：“kv_port”和“engine_id”。“engine_id”应从0开始依次递增，而“kv_port”(例如“30100”)必须对每个P实例唯一，如30000、30100等。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:672
+msgid "Decode node(Same as another D node)"
+msgstr "Decode节点(与另一个D节点相同)"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:769
+msgid ""
+"For each P instance, only the --dp-address parameter differs and must be "
+"configured as the IP address of the service within the same subnet as the"
+" other instances."
+msgstr "对于每个P实例，仅--dp-address参数不同，必须配置为与其他实例在同一子网内的服务IP地址。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:778
+msgid ""
+"For each D instance, only the --dp-rank-start parameter differs, which "
+"should be configured as 0, 8, 16, and 24 respectively.Each instance’s "
+"--dp-address must be set to the IP address of the main D node, which is "
+"the IP of the Decode instance with --dp-rank-start set to 0."
+msgstr "对于每个D实例，仅--dp-rank-start参数不同，应分别配置为0、8、16和24。每个实例的--dp-address必须设置为主D节点的IP地址，即--dp-rank-start设置为0的Decode实例的IP。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:780
+msgid ""
+"The proxy is also implemented by referring [Prefill-Decode Disaggregation"
+" (Deepseek)](../features/pd_disaggregation_mooncake_multi_node.md)."
+msgstr "代理也通过参考[Prefill-Decode分离式部署(Deepseek)](../features/pd_disaggregation_mooncake_multi_node.md)实现。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:782
+msgid ""
+"For ultra-long sequence scenarios, support can be achieved by adjusting "
+"the PD (Prefill/Decode) ratio and the model parallelism strategy. For "
+"example, in a 1M sequence scenario, a 1\\*4P-1\\*4D ratio can be used, "
+"with the model parallelism set to DP4TP8 mode."
+msgstr "对于超长序列场景，可通过调整PD(Prefill/Decode)比例和模型并行策略实现支持。例如，在1M序列场景中，可使用1\\*4P-1\\*4D比例，模型并行设置为DP4TP8模式。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:784
+msgid "Functional Verification"
+msgstr "功能验证"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:786
+msgid "Once your server is started, you can query the model with input prompts:"
+msgstr "服务器启动后，您可以使用输入提示查询模型："
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:804
+msgid "Accuracy Evaluation"
+msgstr "精度评估"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:806
+msgid "Here are two accuracy evaluation methods."
+msgstr "以下是两种精度评估方法。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:808
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:834
+msgid "Using AISBench"
+msgstr "使用AISBench"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:810
+msgid ""
+"Refer to [Using "
+"AISBench](../../developer_guide/evaluation/using_ais_bench.md) for "
+"details."
+msgstr "详情请参考[使用AISBench](../../developer_guide/evaluation/using_ais_bench.md)。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:812
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:830
+msgid "After execution, you can get the result."
+msgstr "执行后即可获取结果。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:814
+msgid "Using Language Model Evaluation Harness"
+msgstr "使用Language Model Evaluation Harness"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:816
+msgid ""
+"As an example, take the `gsm8k` dataset as a test dataset, and run "
+"accuracy evaluation of `DeepSeek-V4` in online mode."
+msgstr "以`gsm8k`数据集作为测试数据集为例，在线模式下运行`DeepSeek-V4`的精度评估。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:818
+msgid ""
+"Refer to [Using "

+msgid ""
+msgstr ""
+"Project-Id-Version: vllm-ascend \n"
+"Report-Msgid-Bugs-To: \n"
+"POT-Creation-Date: 2026-06-07 05:04+0000\n"
+"PO-Revision-Date: YEAR-MO-DA HO:MI+ZONE\n"

+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Pro.md:1
+msgid "DeepSeek-V4-Pro"
+msgstr "DeepSeek-V4-Pro"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Pro.md:3
+msgid "Introduction"
+msgstr "简介"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Pro.md:5
+msgid "DeepSeek-V4 is introducing several key upgrades over DeepSeek-V3."
+msgstr "DeepSeek-V4在DeepSeek-V3基础上引入了多项关键升级。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Pro.md:7
+msgid ""
+"The Manifold-Constrained Hyper-Connections (mHC) to strengthen "
+"conventional residual connections;"
+msgstr "流形约束超连接(mHC)增强传统残差连接；"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Pro.md:8
+msgid ""
+"A hybrid attention architecture, which greatly improves long-context "
+"efficiency through Compress-4-Attention and Compress-128-Attention. For "
+"the Mixture-of Experts (MoE) components, it still adopt the DeepSeekMoE "
+"architecture, with only minor adjustments."
+msgstr "混合注意力架构，通过Compress-4-Attention和Compress-128-Attention大幅提升长上下文效率。对于混合专家(MoE)组件，仍采用DeepSeekMoE架构，仅做少量调整。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Pro.md:10
+msgid ""
+"DeepSeek-V4-Pro, the maximum reasoning effort mode of DeepSeek-V4-Pro, "
+"significantly advances the knowledge capabilities of open-source models, "
+"firmly establishing itself as the best open-source model available today."
+" It achieves top-tier performance in coding benchmarks and significantly "
+"bridges the gap with leading closed-source models on reasoning and "
+"agentic tasks."
+msgstr "DeepSeek-V4-Pro作为DeepSeek-V4-Pro的最大推理努力模式，显著提升了开源模型的知识能力，牢固确立了其作为当今最佳开源模型的地位。它在编码基准测试中达到顶级性能，并在推理和智能体任务上显著缩小了与领先闭源模型的差距。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Pro.md:12
+msgid ""
+"This document will show the main verification steps of the model, "
+"including supported features, feature configuration, environment "
+"preparation, single-node and multi-node deployment, accuracy and "
+"performance evaluation."
+msgstr "本文档将展示该模型的主要验证步骤，包括支持特性、特性配置、环境准备、单节点和多节点部署、精度及性能评估。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Pro.md:14
+msgid "Environment Preparation"
+msgstr "环境准备"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Pro.md:16
+msgid "Model Weight"
+msgstr "模型权重"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Pro.md:18
+msgid ""
+"`DeepSeek-V4-Pro-w4a8-mtp`(Quantized version): require 2 Atlas 800 A3 "
+"(128G × 8) node or 4 Atlas 800 A2 (64G × 8) node. [Download model "
+"weight](https://www.modelscope.cn/models/Eco-Tech/DeepSeek-V4-Pro-"
+"w4a8-mtp)"
+msgstr "`DeepSeek-V4-Pro-w4a8-mtp`(量化版本)：需要2个Atlas 800 A3(128G × 8)节点或4个Atlas 800 A2(64G × 8)节点。[下载模型权重](https://www.modelscope.cn/models/Eco-Tech/DeepSeek-V4-Pro-w4a8-mtp)"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Pro.md:20
+msgid ""
+"It is recommended to download the model weight to the shared directory of"
+" multiple nodes, such as `/root/.cache/`"
+msgstr "建议将模型权重下载到多节点共享目录，例如`/root/.cache/`"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Pro.md:22
+msgid "Verify Multi-node Communication(Optional)"
+msgstr "验证多节点通信(可选)"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Pro.md:24
+msgid ""
+"If you want to deploy multi-node environment, you need to verify multi-"
+"node communication according to [verify multi-node communication "
+"environment](../../installation.md#verify-multi-node-communication)."
+msgstr "如需部署多节点环境，需按照[验证多节点通信环境](../../installation.md#verify-multi-node-communication)验证多节点通信。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Pro.md:26
+msgid "Installation"
+msgstr "安装"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Pro.md:28
+msgid "You can using our official docker image to run `DeepSeek-V4` directly."
+msgstr "您可以直接使用官方docker镜像运行`DeepSeek-V4`。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Pro.md
+msgid "A2 series"
+msgstr "A2系列"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Pro.md:38
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Pro.md:76
+msgid "Start the docker image on your each node."
+msgstr "在每个节点上启动docker镜像。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Pro.md

+msgstr "A3系列"
+

+msgstr "部署"

+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Pro.md:122
+msgid ""

+msgstr "在本教程中，我们假设您已将模型权重下载到`/root/.cache/`。您可以根据需要更改路径。"

+"Project-Id-Version: vllm-ascend \n"
+"Report-Msgid-Bugs-To: \n"

+"PO-Revision-Date: YEAR-MO-DA HO:MI+ZONE\n"

+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/InternVL3.5.md:1
+msgid "InternVL3.5(InternVL3_5-38B/241B-A28B)"
+msgstr "InternVL3.5(InternVL3_5-38B/241B-A28B)"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/InternVL3.5.md:3
+msgid "Introduction"
+msgstr "简介"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/InternVL3.5.md:5
+msgid ""
+"[InternVL3.5](https://huggingface.co/papers/2508.18265), a new family of "
+"open-source multimodal models that significantly advances versatility, "
+"reasoning capability, and inference efficiency along the InternVL series."
+msgstr ""
+"[InternVL3.5](https://huggingface.co/papers/2508.18265)是InternVL系列中新的开源多模态模型家族，显著提升了通用性、推理能力和推理效率。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/InternVL3.5.md:7
+msgid "The `InternVL3.5` model is first supported in `vllm-ascend:v0.20.2`"
+msgstr "`InternVL3.5`模型在`vllm-ascend:v0.20.2`中首次获得支持"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/InternVL3.5.md:9
+msgid ""
+"This document will show the main verification steps of both "
+"`InternVL3_5-38B` and `InternVL3_5-241B-A28B` model, including supported "
+"features, feature configuration, environment preparation, single-node and"
+" multi-node deployment, accuracy and performance evaluation."
+msgstr ""
+"本文档将展示`InternVL3_5-38B`和`InternVL3_5-241B-A28B`模型的主要验证步骤，包括支持特性、特性配置、环境准备、单节点和多节点部署、精度和性能评估。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/InternVL3.5.md:11
+msgid "Supported Features"
+msgstr "支持特性"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/InternVL3.5.md:13
+msgid ""
+"Refer to [supported "
+"features](../../user_guide/support_matrix/supported_models.md) to get the"
+" model's supported feature matrix."
+msgstr ""
+"请参考[支持特性](../../user_guide/support_matrix/supported_models.md)获取模型的支持特性矩阵。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/InternVL3.5.md:15
+msgid ""
+"Refer to [feature guide](../../user_guide/feature_guide/index.md) to get "
+"the feature's configuration."
+msgstr ""
+"请参考[特性指南](../../user_guide/feature_guide/index.md)获取特性的配置。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/InternVL3.5.md:17
+msgid "Environment Preparation"
+msgstr "环境准备"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/InternVL3.5.md:19
+msgid "Model Weight"
+msgstr "模型权重"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/InternVL3.5.md:21
+msgid "require 1 Atlas 800I A2 (64G × 8) node or 1 Atlas 800 A3 (64G × 16) node:"
+msgstr "需要1个Atlas 800I A2 (64G × 8)节点或1个Atlas 800 A3 (64G × 16)节点："
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/InternVL3.5.md:23
+msgid ""
+"`InternVL3_5-38B`:   [Download model "
+"weight](https://huggingface.co/OpenGVLab/InternVL3_5-38B)"
+msgstr ""
+"`InternVL3_5-38B`：[下载模型权重](https://huggingface.co/OpenGVLab/InternVL3_5-38B)"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/InternVL3.5.md:24
+msgid ""
+"`InternVL3_5-241B-A28B`:   [Download model "
+"weight](https://huggingface.co/OpenGVLab/InternVL3_5-241B-A28B)"
+msgstr ""
+"`InternVL3_5-241B-A28B`：[下载模型权重](https://huggingface.co/OpenGVLab/InternVL3_5-241B-A28B)"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/InternVL3.5.md:26
+msgid ""
+"It is recommended to download the model weight to the shared directory of"
+" multiple nodes, such as `/root/.cache/`"
+msgstr ""
+"建议将模型权重下载到多节点的共享目录，例如`/root/.cache/`"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/InternVL3.5.md:28
+msgid "Installation"
+msgstr "安装"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/InternVL3.5.md
+msgid "single-NPU"
+msgstr "单NPU"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/InternVL3.5.md:37
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/InternVL3.5.md:65
+msgid "Run docker container:"
+msgstr "运行Docker容器："
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/InternVL3.5.md
+msgid "multi-NPU"
+msgstr "多NPU"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/InternVL3.5.md
+msgid "Build from source"
+msgstr "从源码构建"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/InternVL3.5.md:101
+msgid "You can build all from source."
+msgstr "您可以从源码构建所有内容。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/InternVL3.5.md:103
+msgid ""
+"Install `vllm-ascend`, refer to [set up using "
+"python](../../installation.md#set-up-using-python)."
+msgstr ""
+"安装`vllm-ascend`，请参考[使用Python设置](../../installation.md#set-up-using-python)。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/InternVL3.5.md:107
+msgid ""
+"If you want to deploy multi-node environment, you need to set up "
+"environment on each node."
+msgstr ""
+"如果要部署多节点环境，需要在每个节点上设置环境。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/InternVL3.5.md:109
+msgid "Deployment"
+msgstr "部署"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/InternVL3.5.md:111
+msgid "Online Serving"
+msgstr "在线服务"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/InternVL3.5.md
+msgid "InternVL3_5-38B"
+msgstr "InternVL3_5-38B"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/InternVL3.5.md:120
+msgid "Run docker container to start the vLLM server on multi-node NPU:"
+msgstr "运行Docker容器以在多节点NPU上启动vLLM服务器："
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/InternVL3.5.md:131
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/InternVL3.5.md:198
+msgid "If your service start successfully, you can see the info shown below:"
+msgstr "如果服务启动成功，您将看到如下信息："
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/InternVL3.5.md:139
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/InternVL3.5.md:206
+msgid "Once your server is started, you can query the model with input prompts:"
+msgstr "服务器启动后，您可以使用输入提示查询模型："
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/InternVL3.5.md:156
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/InternVL3.5.md:223
+msgid ""
+"If you query the server successfully, you can see the info shown below "
+"(client):"
+msgstr ""
+"如果成功查询服务器，您将看到如下信息（客户端）："
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/InternVL3.5.md:162
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/InternVL3.5.md:229
+msgid "Logs of the vllm server:"
+msgstr "vLLM服务器日志："
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/InternVL3.5.md
+msgid "InternVL3_5-241B-A28B"
+msgstr "InternVL3_5-241B-A28B"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/InternVL3.5.md:177
+msgid "Run docker container to start the vLLM server on multi-NPU:"
+msgstr "运行Docker容器以在多NPU上启动vLLM服务器："
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/InternVL3.5.md:243
+msgid "Accuracy Evaluation"
+msgstr "精度评估"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/InternVL3.5.md:245
+msgid "Using Language Model Evaluation Harness"
+msgstr "使用Language Model Evaluation Harness"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/InternVL3.5.md:247
+msgid ""
+"The accuracy of some models is already within our CI monitoring scope, "
+"including:"
+msgstr ""
+"部分模型的精度已在我们的CI监控范围内，包括："
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/InternVL3.5.md:249
+msgid ""
+"As an example, take the `mmmu_val` dataset as a test dataset, and run "
+"accuracy evaluation of `InternVL3_5-241B-A28B` in offline mode."
+msgstr ""
+"以`mmmu_val`数据集为例，在离线模式下运行`InternVL3_5-241B-A28B`的精度评估。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/InternVL3.5.md:251
+msgid ""
+"Refer to [Using "
+"lm_eval](../../developer_guide/evaluation/using_lm_eval.md) for more "
+"details on `lm_eval` installation."
+msgstr ""
+"有关`lm_eval`安装的更多详情，请参考[使用lm_eval](../../developer_guide/evaluation/using_lm_eval.md)。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/InternVL3.5.md:257
+msgid "Run `lm_eval` to execute the accuracy evaluation."
+msgstr "运行`lm_eval`执行精度评估。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/InternVL3.5.md:270
+msgid "Performance"
+msgstr "性能"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/InternVL3.5.md:272
+msgid "Using vLLM Benchmark"
+msgstr "使用vLLM基准测试"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/InternVL3.5.md:274
+msgid ""
+"Refer to [vllm benchmark](https://docs.vllm.ai/en/latest/benchmarking/) "
+"for more details."
+msgstr ""
+"更多详情请参考[vllm基准测试](https://docs.vllm.ai/en/latest/benchmarking/)。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/InternVL3.5.md:276
+msgid "There are three `vllm bench` subcommands:"
+msgstr "有三个`vllm bench`子命令："
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/InternVL3.5.md:278
+msgid "`latency`: Benchmark the latency of a single batch of requests."
+msgstr "`latency`：基准测试单批请求的延迟。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/InternVL3.5.md:279
+msgid "`serve`: Benchmark the online serving throughput."
+msgstr "`serve`：基准测试在线服务吞吐量。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/InternVL3.5.md:280
+msgid "`throughput`: Benchmark offline inference throughput."
+msgstr "`throughput`：基准测试离线推理吞吐量。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/InternVL3.5.md:282
+msgid ""
+"The performance evaluation must be conducted in an online mode. Take the "
+"`serve` as an example. Run the code as follows."
+msgstr ""
+"性能评估必须以在线模式进行。以`serve`为例，按如下方式运行代码。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/InternVL3.5.md:288
+msgid ""
+"After about several minutes, you can get the performance evaluation "
+"result."
+msgstr ""
+"大约几分钟后，您将获得性能评估结果。"

-#: ../../source/tutorials/models/MiniMax-M2.5.md:22

-"`MiniMax-M2.5` (fp8 checkpoint): recommended to use **1× Atlas 800 A3** "
-"or **2× Atlas 800I A2** nodes. Download the model weights from "
-"[MiniMax/MiniMax-M2.5](https://modelscope.cn/models/MiniMax/MiniMax-M2.5)."
+"`--max-num-batched-tokens 32768` 适用于输入序列长度为 32k 或更长的场景。"
 msgstr ""
-"`MiniMax-M2.5`（fp8 检查点）：推荐使用 **1× Atlas 800 A3** 或 **2× Atlas 800I A2** "
-"节点。从 "
-"[MiniMax/MiniMax-M2.5](https://modelscope.cn/models/MiniMax/MiniMax-M2.5)"
-" 下载模型权重。"
-

-msgid ""
-"`MiniMax-M2.5-w8a8-QuaRot` : Download the model weights from [Eco-"
-"Tech/MiniMax-M2.5-w8a8-QuaRot](https://modelscope.cn/models/Eco-"
-"Tech/MiniMax-M2.5-w8a8-QuaRot)."
+"`--max-num-batched-tokens 16384` 适用于输入序列长度为 16k 的场景。"
 msgstr ""
-"`MiniMax-M2.5-w8a8-QuaRot`：从 [Eco-"
-"Tech/MiniMax-M2.5-w8a8-QuaRot](https://modelscope.cn/models/Eco-"
-"Tech/MiniMax-M2.5-w8a8-QuaRot) 下载模型权重。"
-
-#: ../../source/tutorials/models/MiniMax-M2.5.md:24
-msgid ""
-"`Eagle3` : Download the model weights from [vllm-ascend/MiniMax-M2.5"
-"-eagel-model](https://modelscope.cn/models/vllm-ascend/MiniMax-M2.5"
-"-eagel-model-0318)."
-msgstr ""
-"`Eagle3`：从 [vllm-ascend/MiniMax-M2.5-eagel-"
-"model](https://modelscope.cn/models/vllm-ascend/MiniMax-M2.5-eagel-"
-"model-0318) 下载模型权重。"
-
-#: ../../source/tutorials/models/MiniMax-M2.5.md:26
-msgid ""
-"It is recommended to download the model weights to a shared directory, "
-"such as `/mnt/sfs_turbo/.cache/`. The current release automatically "
-"detects the MiniMax-M2 fp8 checkpoint, disables fp8 quantization kernels "
-"on NPU, and loads the weights by dequantizing to bf16. This behavior may "
-"be removed once public bf16 weights are available."
-msgstr ""
-"建议将模型权重下载到共享目录，例如 `/mnt/sfs_turbo/.cache/`。当前版本会自动检测 MiniMax-M2 fp8 检查点，在"
-" NPU 上禁用 fp8 量化内核，并通过反量化为 bf16 来加载权重。一旦公开的 bf16 权重可用，此行为可能会被移除。"
+"`--max-num-batched-tokens 6144` 适用于短序列输入场景，例如 2k 和 3.5k。"
+msgstr "验证服务"
+msgstr "A3（单节点）"
+msgstr "使用 OpenAI 兼容客户端进行测试："
+msgstr "或使用 curl 发送请求："
+msgstr "A2（单节点）"
+msgstr "在任意可以访问服务节点的机器上运行以下命令（将 `{NodeIP}` 替换为实际 IP）："
+msgstr "常见问题"
+msgstr "**问：在 EP 模式下输出乱码怎么办？**"
+msgstr "答：建议保持 `--enable-expert-parallel` 和 `VLLM_ASCEND_ENABLE_FLASHCOMM1=1`。"
+msgstr "**问：为什么使用 `minimax_m2_append_think` 后 `reasoning` 字段经常为空？**"
+msgstr "答：这是预期行为。解析器将 `<think>...</think>` 保留在 `content` 中。如果您主要依赖 `/v1/responses` 的推理语义，请改用 `--reasoning-parser minimax_m2`。"
+msgstr "**问：启动失败，出现 HCCL 端口冲突（地址已被占用）。该怎么办？**"
+msgstr "答：清理旧进程并重启：`pkill -f \"vllm serve /models/MiniMax-M2.5\"`。"
+msgstr "**问：如何处理 OOM 或启动不稳定的问题？**"
+msgstr "答：首先减小 `--max-num-seqs` 和 `--max-num-batched-tokens`。如有必要，降低并发和负载测试压力（例如 `max-concurrency` / `num-prompts`）。"
+msgstr "**问：如何选择 `--reasoning-parser`？**"
+msgstr "答：本指南使用 `minimax_m2_append_think`，以便将 `<think>...</think>` 保留在 `content` 中。如果您主要依赖 `/v1/responses` 的推理语义，请考虑使用 `--reasoning-parser minimax_m2`。"
+msgstr "**问：哪些端口必须可访问？**"

-#: ../../source/tutorials/models/MiniMax-M2.5.md:85
-msgid ""
-"The default configuration assumes an **Atlas 800I A2 8-NPU** node and "
-"sets `ASCEND_RT_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0,1,2,3,4,5,6,7`. Update it based on your"
-" hardware."
-msgstr ""
-"默认配置假设使用 **Atlas 800I A2 8-NPU** 节点，并设置 "
-"`ASCEND_RT_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0,1,2,3,4,5,6,7`。请根据您的硬件进行更新。"
-
-#: ../../source/tutorials/models/MiniMax-M2.5.md:86
-msgid ""
-"Map your model weight directory into the container (the example maps it "
-"to `/opt/data/verification/`)."
-msgstr "将模型权重目录映射到容器中（示例中映射到 `/opt/data/verification/`）。"
-
-#: ../../source/tutorials/models/MiniMax-M2.5.md:121
-msgid "Online Inference on Multi-NPU"
-msgstr "多 NPU 在线推理"
-
-#: ../../source/tutorials/models/MiniMax-M2.5.md:125
-msgid ""
-"Below is a recommended startup configuration for short-context condition "
-"like 3.5k/1.5k to reach a good performance."
-msgstr "以下是在短上下文（如 3.5k/1.5k）条件下达到良好性能的推荐启动配置。"
-
-#: ../../source/tutorials/models/MiniMax-M2.5.md:129
-msgid ""
-"If you only care about short-context low latency, you can explicitly set "
-"`--max-model-len 32768`. You may also set `tensor-parallel-size` to 16 "
-"and set `data-parallel-size` to 1."
-msgstr ""
-"如果只关心短上下文低延迟，可以显式设置 `--max-model-len 32768`。也可以将 `tensor-parallel-size` "
-"设置为 16，将 `data-parallel-size` 设置为 1。"
-
-#: ../../source/tutorials/models/MiniMax-M2.5.md:130
-msgid ""
-"`export VLLM_ASCEND_BALANCE_SCHEDULING=1` is used to enhance scheduling "
-"capacity between prefill and decode. This will work remarkably with a "
-"larger `data-parallel-size`. This can increace performance when "
-"concurrency gets closer to values equals to `data-parallel-size` times "
-"`max-num-seqs`."
-msgstr ""
-"`export VLLM_ASCEND_BALANCE_SCHEDULING=1` 用于增强预填充和解码之间的调度能力。这在使用较大的 "
-"`data-parallel-size` 时效果显著。当并发数接近 `data-parallel-size` 乘以 `max-num-seqs` "
-"时，可以提升性能。"
-
-#: ../../source/tutorials/models/MiniMax-M2.5.md:167
-msgid "Remarks:"
-msgstr "备注："
-
-#: ../../source/tutorials/models/MiniMax-M2.5.md:169
-msgid "`minimax_m2_append_think` keeps `<think>...</think>` inside `content`."
-msgstr "`minimax_m2_append_think` 将 `<think>...</think>` 保留在 `content` 中。"
-
-#: ../../source/tutorials/models/MiniMax-M2.5.md:170
-msgid ""
-"If you mainly rely on the reasoning semantics of `/v1/responses`, it is "
-"recommended to use `--reasoning-parser minimax_m2` instead."
-msgstr "如果主要依赖 `/v1/responses` 的推理语义，建议使用 `--reasoning-parser minimax_m2` 代替。"
-
-#: ../../source/tutorials/models/MiniMax-M2.5.md:171
-msgid ""
-"To receive a better performance on long-context like 128k or 64k, we "
-"recommend to do changes as shown below, and you can remove `export "
-"VLLM_ASCEND_BALANCE_SCHEDULING=1`."
-msgstr ""
-"为了在 128k 或 64k 等长上下文场景下获得更好的性能，我们建议进行如下更改，并可以移除 `export "
-"VLLM_ASCEND_BALANCE_SCHEDULING=1`。"
-

 #: ../../source/user_guide/feature_guide/dynamic_chunk_pipeline_parallel.md:7
 msgid "Overview"
@@ -42,8 +34,7 @@ msgid ""
 "Dynamic Chunked Pipeline Parallel (CPP) is a profiling-based dynamic "
 "chunking strategy that optimizes prefill performance for long sequences "
 "in Pipeline Parallelism (PP) scenarios."
-msgstr ""
-"动态分块流水线并行（CPP）是一种基于性能分析的动态分块策略，用于优化流水线并行（PP）场景中长序列的预填充性能。"
+msgstr "动态分块流水线并行（CPP）是一种基于性能分析的动态分块策略，用于优化流水线并行（PP）场景中长序列的预填充性能。"
 
 #: ../../source/user_guide/feature_guide/dynamic_chunk_pipeline_parallel.md:11
 msgid "When to Use"
@@ -54,16 +45,14 @@ msgid ""
 "**Variable-length sequence serving**: PP does not introduce degradation "
 "on short sequences, and gains benefits through dynamic chunks on long "
 "sequences."
-msgstr ""
-"**变长序列服务**：PP对短序列不会引入性能退化，并通过长序列的动态分块获得收益。"
+msgstr "**变长序列服务**：PP对短序列不会引入性能退化，并通过长序列的动态分块获得收益。"
 
 #: ../../source/user_guide/feature_guide/dynamic_chunk_pipeline_parallel.md:14
 msgid ""
 "**Ultra-long sequence inference**: For sequences exceeding single-machine"
 " memory capacity (e.g., 1M tokens), dynamic chunking significantly "
 "reduces pipeline idle time."
-msgstr ""
-"**超长序列推理**：对于超出单机内存容量的序列（如1M tokens），动态分块可显著减少流水线空闲时间。"
+msgstr "**超长序列推理**：对于超出单机内存容量的序列（如1M tokens），动态分块可显著减少流水线空闲时间。"

@@ -233,15 +221,15 @@ msgstr "max-num-batched-tokens"

 "(considered the initial chunksize for dynamic solving).** Because if it "
-"is too large, it will introduce si gnificant computational voids, and if "
+"is too large, it will introduce significant computational voids, and if "
 "it is too small, it will lead to a decrease in operator efficiency. To "
 "leave enough room for dynamic adjustments, we recommend that the longer "
 "the sequence being processed, the larger the `max-num-batched-tokens` "
 "should be set. Recommended values:"
 msgstr ""
 "**值得注意的是，CPP的TTFT对`max-num-batched-tokens`（视为动态求解的初始分块大小）非常敏感。** "
-"因为如果设置过大，会引入显著的计算空洞；如果设置过小，则会导致算子效率下降。"
-"为给动态调整留出足够空间，建议处理的序列越长，`max-num-batched-tokens`设置越大。推荐值："
+"因为如果设置过大，会引入显著的计算空洞；如果设置过小，则会导致算子效率下降。为给动态调整留出足够空间，建议处理的序列越长，`max-num-"
+"batched-tokens`设置越大。推荐值："

 #: ../../source/user_guide/feature_guide/kv_pool.md:113
+msgid "Embedded Real Client Mode（Mooncake ssd-offload.md Step 3A）"
+msgstr "嵌入式真实客户端模式（Mooncake ssd-offload.md 步骤 3A）"
+
+#: ../../source/user_guide/feature_guide/kv_pool.md:116
+msgid "mooncake >= v0.3.11"
+msgstr "mooncake >= v0.3.11"
+
+#: ../../source/user_guide/feature_guide/kv_pool.md:118
+msgid "Start the master"
+msgstr "启动 mooncake_master"
+
+#: ../../source/user_guide/feature_guide/kv_pool.md
+msgid "Field"
+msgstr "字段"
+
+#: ../../source/user_guide/feature_guide/kv_pool.md
+msgid "`enable_offload`"
+msgstr "`enable_offload`"
+
+#: ../../source/user_guide/feature_guide/kv_pool.md
+msgid "Set `true` to enable SSD offload."
+msgstr "设置为 `true` 以启用 SSD 卸载。"
+
+#: ../../source/user_guide/feature_guide/kv_pool.md:128
+msgid "Configuration"
+msgstr "配置"
+
+#: ../../source/user_guide/feature_guide/kv_pool.md:130
+msgid "Add the following fields to your `mooncake.json`:"
+msgstr "将以下字段添加到您的 `mooncake.json` 中："
+
+#: ../../source/user_guide/feature_guide/kv_pool.md
+msgid "`enable_ssd_offload`"
+msgstr "`enable_ssd_offload`"
+
+#: ../../source/user_guide/feature_guide/kv_pool.md
+msgid ""
+"Set to `true` to enable SSD offload. Environment variables are not "
+"supported."
+msgstr "设置为 `true` 以启用 SSD 卸载。不支持环境变量。"
+
+#: ../../source/user_guide/feature_guide/kv_pool.md
+msgid "`ssd_offload_path`"
+msgstr "`ssd_offload_path`"
+
+#: ../../source/user_guide/feature_guide/kv_pool.md
+msgid ""
+"**Required when `enable_ssd_offload` is `true`.** Absolute path to a "
+"local directory where Mooncake stores offloaded KV data (for example, "
+"`/nvme/mooncake_offload`). The directory must exist and be writable by "
+"the vLLM process; create it before startup (`mkdir -p <path>`). Relative "
+"paths, symbolic links, and paths containing `..` are rejected by "
+"Mooncake. Passed to `MooncakeDistributedStore.setup()` as the SSD storage"
+" root (equivalent to `MOONCAKE_OFFLOAD_FILE_STORAGE_PATH` in standalone "
+"clients). Configure this field in `mooncake.json` only; environment "
+"variables are not supported."
+msgstr ""
+"**当 `enable_ssd_offload` 为 `true` 时必填。** Mooncake 存储卸载的 KV 数据的本地目录的绝对路径（例如，"
+"`/nvme/mooncake_offload`）。该目录必须存在且可由 vLLM 进程写入；请在启动前创建它（`mkdir -p <path>`）。"
+"Mooncake 会拒绝相对路径、符号链接以及包含 `..` 的路径。该值作为 SSD 存储根目录传递给 "
+"`MooncakeDistributedStore.setup()`（相当于独立客户端中的 `MOONCAKE_OFFLOAD_FILE_STORAGE_PATH`）。"
+"仅在 `mooncake.json` 中配置此字段；不支持环境变量。"
+
+#: ../../source/user_guide/feature_guide/kv_pool.md:151
+msgid "Running the Embedded Real Client"
+msgstr "运行嵌入式真实客户端"
+
+#: ../../source/user_guide/feature_guide/kv_pool.md:153
+msgid ""
+"With Mode A (Embedded Real Client), Mooncake is embedded in vLLM. When "
+"the vLLM service starts, `AscendStoreConnector` / `MooncakeBackend` "
+"automatically calls `MooncakeDistributedStore.setup()` using the settings"
+" in `mooncake.json` (including `enable_ssd_offload` and "
+"`ssd_offload_path` when SSD offload is enabled). No separate "
+"`mooncake_client` process is required."
+msgstr ""
+"在模式 A（嵌入式真实客户端）下，Mooncake 嵌入在 vLLM 中。当 vLLM 服务启动时，"
+"`AscendStoreConnector` / `MooncakeBackend` 会使用 `mooncake.json` 中的设置"
+"（包括启用 SSD 卸载时的 `enable_ssd_offload` 和 `ssd_offload_path`）自动调用 "
+"`MooncakeDistributedStore.setup()`。无需单独的 `mooncake_client` 进程。"
+
+#: ../../source/user_guide/feature_guide/kv_pool.md:155
+msgid "SSD Disk Usage Control"
+msgstr "SSD 磁盘使用控制"
+
+#: ../../source/user_guide/feature_guide/kv_pool.md:157
+msgid ""
+"The following environment variables control disk space usage for SSD "
+"offload (bucket backend):"
+msgstr "以下环境变量控制 SSD 卸载（bucket 后端）的磁盘空间使用："
+
+#: ../../source/user_guide/feature_guide/kv_pool.md
+msgid "Environment Variable"
+msgstr "环境变量"
+
+#: ../../source/user_guide/feature_guide/kv_pool.md
+msgid "Default"
+msgstr "默认值"
+
+#: ../../source/user_guide/feature_guide/kv_pool.md
+msgid "`MOONCAKE_OFFLOAD_BUCKET_MAX_TOTAL_SIZE`"
+msgstr "`MOONCAKE_OFFLOAD_BUCKET_MAX_TOTAL_SIZE`"
+
+#: ../../source/user_guide/feature_guide/kv_pool.md
+msgid "`0`"
+msgstr "`0`"
+
+#: ../../source/user_guide/feature_guide/kv_pool.md
+#, python-format
+msgid ""
+"Eviction threshold in bytes. When set to `0`, the backend uses **90% of "
+"the physical disk capacity** as the quota. Set an explicit value to "
+"control disk usage precisely."
+msgstr ""
+"以字节为单位的驱逐阈值。当设置为 `0` 时，后端使用**物理磁盘容量的 90%** 作为配额。设置显式值以精确控制磁盘使用。"
+
+#: ../../source/user_guide/feature_guide/kv_pool.md
+msgid "`MOONCAKE_OFFLOAD_BUCKET_EVICTION_POLICY`"
+msgstr "`MOONCAKE_OFFLOAD_BUCKET_EVICTION_POLICY`"
+
+#: ../../source/user_guide/feature_guide/kv_pool.md
+msgid "`none`"
+msgstr "`none`"
+
+#: ../../source/user_guide/feature_guide/kv_pool.md
+msgid "Eviction policy: `none` (writes fail when full), `fifo`, or `lru`."
+msgstr "驱逐策略：`none`（满时写入失败）、`fifo` 或 `lru`。"
+
+#: ../../source/user_guide/feature_guide/kv_pool.md
+msgid "`MOONCAKE_OFFLOAD_TOTAL_SIZE_LIMIT_BYTES`"
+msgstr "`MOONCAKE_OFFLOAD_TOTAL_SIZE_LIMIT_BYTES`"
+
+#: ../../source/user_guide/feature_guide/kv_pool.md
+msgid "`2199023255552` (2 TB)"
+msgstr "`2199023255552`（2 TB）"
+
+#: ../../source/user_guide/feature_guide/kv_pool.md
+msgid "Global maximum disk usage limit."
+msgstr "全局最大磁盘使用限制。"
+
+#: ../../source/user_guide/feature_guide/kv_pool.md:165
+msgid ""
+"Since each TP rank uses an independent SSD subdirectory (`rank_0/`, "
+"`rank_1/`, ...) under `ssd_offload_path`, all ranks share the same "
+"physical disk. To prevent a single rank from consuming excessive space, "
+"set an explicit per-rank quota. For example, with an 800 GB disk and 8 TP"
+" ranks:"
+msgstr ""
+"由于每个 TP rank 在 `ssd_offload_path` 下使用独立的 SSD 子目录（`rank_0/`、`rank_1/`、...），"
+"所有 rank 共享同一物理磁盘。为防止单个 rank 消耗过多空间，请设置显式的每 rank 配额。例如，对于 800 GB 磁盘和 8 个 TP rank："
+
+#: ../../source/user_guide/feature_guide/kv_pool.md:173
+#: ../../source/user_guide/feature_guide/kv_pool.md:930
+msgid "Notes"
+msgstr "注意事项"
+
+#: ../../source/user_guide/feature_guide/kv_pool.md:175
+msgid "This feature requires mooncake >= v0.3.11."
+msgstr "此功能需要 mooncake >= v0.3.11。"
+

 "backend—such as NFS, 3FS, or enterprise-grade storage—serves as the "
 "persistent KV store."
 msgstr ""
-"统一缓存管理器（UCM）为vLLM/vLLM-Ascend中的前缀缓存场景提供外部KV缓存存储层。"
-"与仅通过聚合设备内存扩展前缀缓存容量、因此仍受HBM/DRAM大小限制且缺乏持久性的"
-"KV池化不同，UCM将计算与存储解耦，采用分层设计。每个节点使用本地DRAM作为快速缓存，"
-"而共享后端（如NFS、3FS或企业级存储）则作为持久化KV存储。"
+"统一缓存管理器（UCM）为vLLM/vLLM-"
+"Ascend中的前缀缓存场景提供外部KV缓存存储层。与仅通过聚合设备内存扩展前缀缓存容量、因此仍受HBM/DRAM大小限制且缺乏持久性的KV池化不同，UCM将计算与存储解耦，采用分层设计。每个节点使用本地DRAM作为快速缓存，而共享后端（如NFS、3FS或企业级存储）则作为持久化KV存储。"
 
 #: ../../source/user_guide/feature_guide/ucm_deployment.md:7
 msgid "**Key benefits of using UCM:**"
@@ -53,19 +51,15 @@ msgid ""
 "constrained by HBM/DRAM size. UCM removes this ceiling by offloading KV "
 "cache to external storage, enabling cache capacity to scale with the "
 "storage system rather than with compute resources."
-msgstr ""
-"**突破设备内存容量限制**：传统前缀缓存受限于HBM/DRAM大小。UCM通过将KV缓存卸载到"
-"外部存储来消除这一上限，使缓存容量随存储系统而非计算资源扩展。"
+msgstr "**突破设备内存容量限制**：传统前缀缓存受限于HBM/DRAM大小。UCM通过将KV缓存卸载到外部存储来消除这一上限，使缓存容量随存储系统而非计算资源扩展。"
 
 #: ../../source/user_guide/feature_guide/ucm_deployment.md:11
 msgid ""
 "**Persistent and Reliable KV Cache**: UCM provides durable KV cache "
 "storage, ensuring that cached prefix blocks survive across service "
 "restarts, instance failures, or scheduling migrations. This is critical "
 "for production-grade inference systems."
-msgstr ""
-"**持久可靠的KV缓存**：UCM提供持久的KV缓存存储，确保缓存的prefix块在服务重启、"
-"实例故障或调度迁移后仍然存活。这对生产级推理系统至关重要。"
+msgstr "**持久可靠的KV缓存**：UCM提供持久的KV缓存存储，确保缓存的prefix块在服务重启、实例故障或调度迁移后仍然存活。这对生产级推理系统至关重要。"
 
 #: ../../source/user_guide/feature_guide/ucm_deployment.md:13
 msgid ""
@@ -75,10 +69,7 @@ msgid ""
 "Additionally, UCM provides PD disaggregation solutions based on storage-"
 "compute separation architecture, enabling flexible management of "
 "heterogeneous computing resources."
-msgstr ""
-"**多场景加速**：UCM不仅支持前缀缓存，还提供免训练的稀疏注意力方法（如GSA、"
-"CacheBlend）用于处理超长序列推理任务。此外，UCM基于存算分离架构提供PD分离"
-"解决方案，实现异构计算资源的灵活管理。"
+msgstr "**多场景加速**：UCM不仅支持前缀缓存，还提供免训练的稀疏注意力方法（如GSA、CacheBlend）用于处理超长序列推理任务。此外，UCM基于存算分离架构提供PD分离解决方案，实现异构计算资源的灵活管理。"

@@ -87,9 +78,7 @@ msgid ""

-"**3-10倍**推理延迟降低。基准测试显示，在前缀缓存场景中TTFT提升高达**8倍**。"

 msgid ""
 "In P2P distributed PD disaggregation, Mooncake handles direct KV cache "
 "transfer from Prefill to Decode nodes via high-speed network, while UCM "
 "provides prefix cache on Prefill nodes for KV cache reuse. This mode is "
 "suitable for scenarios with homogeneous P/D nodes and lower latency "
 "requirements."
-msgstr ""
-"在P2P分布式PD分离部署中，Mooncake通过高速网络处理从Prefill节点到Decode节点的直接KV缓存传输，而UCM在Prefill节点上提供前缀缓存以实现KV缓存复用。此模式适用于同构P/D节点且延迟要求较低的场景。"
+msgstr "在P2P分布式PD分离部署中，Mooncake通过高速网络处理从Prefill节点到Decode节点的直接KV缓存传输，而UCM在Prefill节点上提供前缀缓存以实现KV缓存复用。此模式适用于同构P/D节点且延迟要求较低的场景。"

 msgid "PD-Mixed Inference"
 msgstr "PD混合推理"
 
-#: ../../source/user_guide/feature_guide/ucm_deployment.md:368
+#: ../../source/user_guide/feature_guide/ucm_deployment.md:365
 msgid ""
 "PD-Mixed Inference refers to the standard vLLM serving mode where Prefill"
 " and Decode phases for different requests are processed concurrently "
@@ -542,273 +526,263 @@ msgid ""
 "both phases in a unified scheduler, allowing interleaved execution: while"
 " one request is in Decode phase, another request can simultaneously "
 "undergo Prefill."
-msgstr ""
-"PD混合推理是指标准vLLM服务模式，其中不同请求的Prefill和Decode阶段在同一实例内并发处理。与将Prefill和Decode物理分离到专用实例的PD分离部署不同，PD混合在统一调度器中处理两个阶段，允许交错执行：当一个请求处于Decode阶段时，另一个请求可以同时进行Prefill。"
+msgstr "PD混合推理是指标准vLLM服务模式，其中不同请求的Prefill和Decode阶段在同一实例内并发处理。与将Prefill和Decode物理分离到专用实例的PD分离部署不同，PD混合在统一调度器中处理两个阶段，允许交错执行：当一个请求处于Decode阶段时，另一个请求可以同时进行Prefill。"

 " hit rate equal to the pre-seeding ratio of 0.8, significantly reducing "
 "TTFT compared to HBM PC. The improved TTFT effectively increases Prefill "
 "instance throughput, thereby boosting the overall system throughput."
-msgstr "**注意**：由于数据并行性，测试阶段的请求可能不会被路由到用于 KV 缓存预填充的同一 DP 进程。因此，HBM PC 的实际缓存命中率低于预期的 0.8。UCM 通过将所有 KV 缓存存储在共享外部存储中来解决此限制，确保无论请求由哪个 DP 进程处理，都能命中缓存数据。这保证了真实的缓存命中率等于预填充比例 0.8，与 HBM PC 相比显著降低了 TTFT。改进的 TTFT 有效提高了 Prefill 实例的吞吐量，从而提升了整体系统吞吐量。"
+msgstr ""
+"**注意**：由于数据并行性，测试阶段的请求可能不会被路由到用于 KV 缓存预填充的同一 DP 进程。因此，HBM PC "
+"的实际缓存命中率低于预期的 0.8。UCM 通过将所有 KV 缓存存储在共享外部存储中来解决此限制，确保无论请求由哪个 DP "
+"进程处理，都能命中缓存数据。这保证了真实的缓存命中率等于预填充比例 0.8，与 HBM PC 相比显著降低了 TTFT。改进的 TTFT "
+"有效提高了 Prefill 实例的吞吐量，从而提升了整体系统吞吐量。"
